_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct on-net and off-net activities to control, and exfiltrate data from deployed, automated technologies.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data integration patterns including ETL, ELT, event streaming, CDC (change data capture), API-based integration, and data virtualization.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-007 (DA, cosine: 0.482), SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.419). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [activities, automated, conduct, control, deployed, exfiltrate] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, based, capture, cdc, change, elt] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.849 (P=0.854, R=0.844). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Conduct on-net and off-net activities to control, and exfiltrate data from deplo" and "Knowledge of data integration patterns including ETL, ELT, event streaming, CDC" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.532 > STS 0.419 (gap +0.113). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [activities, automated, conduct, control, deployed, exfiltrate]. WIDAI-only: [api, based, capture, cdc, change, elt].
